programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: In southern Louisiana, Lt. David Nunez and Sgt. Austin Arteaga investigate a group of bird hunters on opening day of teal season; a repeated offender is busted for taking immature crabs; a late-night deer decoy leads to a hunter in handcuffs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: Deep in the woods and bayous of Louisiana, wildlife agents protect the state's resources; a crab fisherman is caught stealing dozens of traps, a hunter crosses state lines with an illegal deer and agents rescue an injured bald eagle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: While using the LDWF's spy in the sky drone, agents track down a boat captain breaking the law in Plaquemines Parish; a family of shrimpers is investigated for pulling oversized nets; two feuding fishermen are suspected of being under the influence.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: In Ouachita Parish, a trespassing investigation leads to a dicey encounter and multiple seizures of deer; agents confront a group of duck hunters who are spotted killing non-game birds; health code violations are found during a routine oyster patrol.

programme.desc: When wildlife agents find an alligator with a fresh bullet wound to the head, nearby anglers are the prime suspects; an injured hunter must be evacuated by helicopter; agents use drones to track crabbers selling their catch across state lines.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: The search is on for a missing boater who may have suffered a stroke on Corney Lake; wildlife agents deploy as a hurricane makes landfall, rescuing stranded survivors from the floodwaters and dispensing lifesaving supplies.

programme.desc: Paul hopes to capture a gator before it gets hooked by an uncaring trapper; Tre books a risque photo shoot with gators and swimsuit models.

programme.desc: Ashley has a bad experience in the gator pit; Jimmy accuses Chris of poor training methods.

programme.desc: A woman creates a video as a desperate plea for help to find her ferocious feline a new home; a couple has three cats who viciously attack one another while treating the home as their personal litter box.

programme.desc: A polar bear chases down Erin Greene as she walks home from a Halloween party in a small arctic town; a bull shark attacks triathlete Chuck Anderson in the Gulf of Mexico, biting his arm and pulling him to the ocean floor.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A grizzly bear charges taxidermist Wilf Lloyd while he hunts elk with his son-in-law in the Canadian Rocky Mountains; miles from shore, diving 180 feet below the surface, spearfisher Anthony Segrich finds a bull shark charging toward him.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A black bear charges Joe Azzouggagh and his German shepherd, Ace, deep in the Ontario wilderness; single father Andrew Dickehage, forced to walk six miles along a rural road at night, comes under attack from unseen predators.
